title: INDEX prevents JOIN from discovering matches
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TEST1 ( one VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, two INT DEFAULT 0, three DATE );
CREATE TABLE TEST2 ( one VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL, two INT CHECK (two >= 0), four FLOAT );
CREATE INDEX idx_test1 ON TEST1 ( one, two );
SELECT * FROM TEST1 JOIN TEST2 ON TEST1.one = TEST2.one WHERE TEST1.two = TEST2.two;
key_bug_features: INDEX on TEST1 disrupts JOIN match discovery
